data.title: Humanoid Global closes Special Warrant Financing, issuing 2.5M Special Warrants at $0.80 each for $2M proceeds.
data.description: Vancouver-based Humanoid Global Holdings Corp. has successfully completed a non-brokered private placement of special warrants priced at $0.80 each. The company issued a total of 2,500,000 Special Warrants, resulting in gross proceeds of $2,000,000. This investment issuer, traded publicly under CSE:ROBO, FWB:0XM1, and OTCQB:RBOHF, focuses on developing a portfolio of innovative companies in the humanoid robotics and embodied AI sector. This announcement follows the news release from October 14, 2025.

data.title: Utility Trailer Manufacturing Company appoints Kevin Williams as TRU & Telematics Product Specialist. Williams offers 34 years of experience in TRU products, benefitting Utility’s network in the U.S., Canada & Mexico.
data.description: In City of Industry, California, Utility Trailer Manufacturing Company, LLC has appointed Kevin Williams as the TRU (Transport Refrigeration Unit) & Telematics Product Specialist at its Alpharetta, Georgia regional sales office. With 34 years of experience in TRU products, Williams will support Utility's dealer network in the U.S., Canada, and Mexico. This announcement showcases Utility Trailer's commitment to enhancing its services and expertise in the industry. Whether it's Cargobull, Carrier, or Thermo King products, Williams will serve as a key asset in providing technical and sales support to the company's operations.

data.title: SpaceX, owned by Elon Musk, transferred $133 million worth of Bitcoin after moving funds last week.
data.description: SpaceX, the space exploration company led by Elon Musk, relocated Bitcoin valued at $133 million on Friday following a previous transfer of funds earlier in the week.

data.title: Nipocalimab shows promising results for Sjögren's disease in Phase 2 study by reducing autoantibodies, meeting primary endpoint with significant ClinESSDAI score improvement at Week 24. Mentioned in The Lancet.
data.description: In the Phase 2 DAHLIAS study, Nipocalimab, a novel FcRn blocker under evaluation for Sjögren's syndrome, successfully achieved its primary goal. The study showed a notable enhancement in the ClinESSDAI score, derived from 11 essential systemic disease areas, in comparison to the placebo group at the 24-week mark. This improvement was statistically significant.

data.title: Peter Schiff challenges Binance's CZ to debate whether Bitcoin or tokenized gold is a better form of money. Exciting discussion upcoming!
data.description: Renowned gold advocate Peter Schiff has issued a challenge to CZ, the head of Binance, for a debate on the topic of Bitcoin versus tokenized gold. The debate aims to delve into which of the two assets better serves as a form of money. This exciting exchange of ideas has sparked interest among the community, with many eagerly anticipating the outcome. Stay tuned for more developments on this intriguing debate.

data.title: Shepherd's is KC's top menswear brand, co-founded by Harrison Butker. Offers made-to-measure excellence. #KCMensFashion
data.description: On October 24, 2025, in Kansas City, Missouri, a unique made-to-measure men's clothing brand named Shepherd's has made its mark with a compelling story and a meaningful purpose. Situated in the heart of Kansas City, Shepherd's has quickly become a go-to destination for customers seeking custom-tailored apparel. The brand was co-founded by members of the Kansas City Chiefs, adding a touch of sports influence to its style. Shepherd's commitment to excellence in providing personalized clothing experiences sets it apart in the competitive market, drawing attention and praise from fashion enthusiasts.

data.title: Rand McNally teams up with Platform Science to launch Rand Navigation with Rand Road IQ for commercial fleet technology.
data.description: In Boise, Idaho on October 24, 2025, Rand McNally, a company with over 165 years of experience in commercial mapping and fleet technology, revealed a new collaboration. They have joined forces with Platform Science to introduce Rand Navigation, powered by Rand Road IQ, to the Virtual Vehicle. This partnership aims to enhance fleet technology and mapping services.

data.title: Bitcoin mining stocks surged after Jane Street revealed new investments, continuing a months-long uptrend.
data.description: The stock prices of top Bitcoin mining companies surged following the revelation of Jane Street's increased holdings on Thursday. This news further fueled an ongoing rally in publicly traded mining stocks that has continued over the past few months.

data.title: Report: Selig, a pro-crypto, set to be nominated as CFTC chair; Quintenz withdrawn in Sept, causing delay. #SEC #CFTC
data.description: In September, the CFTC nomination process encountered a setback when Brian Quintenz was withdrawn, paving the way for Michael Selig to be rumored as the replacement. This development comes amidst speculation and uncertainty, with Quintenz's exit leaving a vacancy in the CFTC. The transition marks a significant change in leadership, as Selig's potential nomination could bring fresh perspectives and expertise to the organization. The financial industry is closely monitoring this situation, as both Quintenz and Selig are key figures in the regulatory landscape. The nomination is a crucial step in ensuring the smooth operation of the CFTC, with the expectations running high on Selig's appointment. The numbers involved in this process underscore the importance of a seamless transition, including the impact on regulatory decisions and market stability. Stay tuned for further updates on this evolving situation as the CFTC undergoes a potential leadership change.

data.title: Bitcoin remains stable around $109K post-Trump's pardon of Binance's CZ, amidst EU crypto sanctions on Russian exchanges. Market sentiment affected.
data.description: The price of Bitcoin remains stable around $109,000 after former President Trump pardoned Binance's CEO. However, the European Union has placed sanctions on Russian cryptocurrency exchanges, causing an impact on market confidence.

data.title: Pennant Group (NASDAQ: PNTG) to release Q3 2025 financial results on Nov 5. Home health, hospice and senior living services.
data.description: In Eagle, Idaho, on October 24, 2025, The Pennant Group, Inc. (NASDAQ: PNTG), a company overseeing entities offering home health, hospice, and senior living services, shared plans to reveal its third quarter 2025 financial results on November 5, 2025.

data.title: Justin Boots introduces CPX Collection, setting new standards for Western craftsmanship with luxury materials and modern innovation.
data.description: Based in Fort Worth, Texas, Justin Boots, a prominent cowboy boot manufacturer established in 1879, has recently unveiled the CPX Collection. This new line showcases Western craftsmanship with a blend of luxury materials, modern innovation, and classic authenticity. Serving as a significant leap forward in the company's product offerings, the CPX Collection signifies a new chapter in Justin Boots' history.
